Name: Sneak Hit
Effect: 9/10 chance to reduce the opponent's current HP by 1/2, 1/10 chance to instantly kill them. Cannot be used against Darklings or boss monsters.

Name: Thunder
Effect: Reduces the opponent's current HP by 1/2, 1/10 chance to destroy their weapon, shield or accessory.

Name: Soul Fire
Effect: Increases AT by 50% every turn after using the skill.

Name: Celerity
Effect: Increases SP by 50%.

Name: Prayer
Effect: Heals 50% of the user's total HP and cures some Status ailments.

Name: Virus
Effect: 3/4 chance to reduce the opponent's AT, DF, MG and SP by 25%.

Name: Sing
Effect: 3/4 chance to confuse the opponent for 1~3 turns.

Name: Glory
Effect: Forces the opponent to give up. Has a chance to work on another adventurer who isn't a Darkling and Town Bosses, and cannot be used on certain monsters. Can work on wanted adventurers, causing the user to get bounty reward without killing the opponent.

Name: Howl
Effect: Inflicts Fear on the opponent.

Name: Heal
Effect: Recovers all HP.

Name: Will Bind
Effect: Seals the opponent's Counter and Give Up command for 1~3 turns.

Name: Guard
Effect: Increases random, multiple stats by 50%.

Name: Afterburn
Effect: Increases AT, DF, MG and SP by 50% for the battle, but cuts the user's HP by half afterwards.

Name: Restrict
Effect: 1/2 chance to seal a random battle command on the opponent for 1~3 turns.

Name: Power Poke
Effect: 4/5 chance to reduce the opponent's current HP by 1/4, 1/5 chance to instantly kill them.

Name: Delete
Effect: Destroys the opponent's Weapon, Shield, Accessory, Offensive Magic, Defensive Magic, All G, All Items, or All Field Magic. Delete cannot be used against a Darkling if it created through ????.

Name: Brimstone
Effect: Reduces the opponent's current HP by 1/4, 1/20 chance to destroy their shield.

Name: Harden
Effect: 9/10 chance to nullify physical attacks for 1~3 turns. Can also block some battle skills.

Name: Quake
Effect: 1/5 chance to reduce the opponent's current HP by 1/3 and stun them for 1 turn.

Name: Wail
Effect: 3/5 chance to reduce the opponent's current HP by 1/8, 2/5 chance to instantly kill them.

Name: Squeeze
Effect: 2/5 chance to stun the opponent for 1~3 turns.

Name: Strikeout
Effect: 1/2 chance to destroy the opponent's equipment.

Name: Waterfall
Effect: Reduces the opponent's current HP by 1/6, 1/32 chance to destroy their weapon.

Name: Petrify
Effect: 1/2 chance to stun the opponent for 1~3 turns.

Name: Tornado
Effect: Reduces the opponent's current HP by 1/4, 1/20 chance to destroy their accessory.

Name: Charge
Effect: Increases AT by 50% until a physical attack is used. Can stack.

Name: Chakra
Effect: Increase AT and MG by 50% for the battle.

Name: Overlord
Effect: 1/2 chance to triple AT and 1/2 to cut it in half.

Name: Tsunami
Effect: Reduces the opponent's current HP by 1/4, 1/20 chance to destroy their weapon.

Name: Copy
Effect: Copies all of the opponent's stats that are higher than the user's.

Name: Poison
Effect: 9/10 chance to poison the opponent.

Name: Play Dumb
Effect: 9/10 chance to nullify magical attacks for 1~3 turns. Can also block some battle skills.

Name: Escape
Effect: Escapes from the battle with no risk, and will be invincible until the next turn, similar to the timeout after surrendering.

Name: Steal
Effect: 1/4 chance to steal an item from the target (a random item from a player or drop 1 from a monster). The player must defeat the monster to receive the item.

Name: Rob
Effect: 1/2 to steal all gold, items and field magic from the opponent.

Name: Breath
Effect: Reduces the opponent's current HP by 1/6, 1/32 chance to destroy their shield.

Name: Debug
Effect: 7/10 chance to reduce the opponent's HP to 1. Does not work against certain monsters.

Name: Decoy
Effect: 1/2 chance to dodge any attack for the battle.

Name: Transform
Effect: Transform into the opponent, copying all their stats and abilities.

Name: Muscle
Effect: Increases AT and DF by 50% for the battle.

Name: Heckfire
Effect: Reduces the opponent's current HP by 1/3, 1/10 chance to destroy their weapon, shield or accessory.

Name: Pierce
Effect: Until the end of the battle, the user's physical attacks will ignore the opponent's DF.

Name: Meditate
Effect: Increases MG by 50% until a magical attack is used. Can stack.

Name: Toughen
Effect: Doubles DF.

Name: Alchemy
Effect: Generates money from damage inflicts on the opponent. See Alchemist for more details.
Becomes another, random adventurer battle skill for each battle.
